creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
If mailman is installed with the MNLS option enabled, the
	messages and templates trees are not installed but are still
	listed in pkg-plist.

How-To-Repeat: 	With the MNLS option set:

	    cd /usr/ports/mail/mailman && make install && make deinstall

	Note the large number of deinstall errors.
